text: The Mental Health Seminar is scheduled for Falgun 1, 2081 at the Library Hall from 2 PM to 4 PM. All students of Pulchowk Campus are encouraged to attend and prioritize their wellbeing.

text: With the constant stress of the modern world,people are more unhappy than ever before. So peace of mind is going to be a rare commodity in the world With the aim to provide a mental stillness the Fitness Club is conducting a "Mental Health Day " for the students of IOE to be conducted from the 4th of July to 8th July in the Library Hall.

text: Due to popular demand LOCUS is back with its article writing competition. Be sure to register by the 4th of August and be ready with your articles.The prize pool  is of Rs50000.

text: There is no counsellor or mental health professional available on campus despite students repeatedly raising the issue. Many students are suffering silently with no support system in place.
label: complaint

text: The mental health of engineering students at Pulchowk is being severely neglected. Workload is excessive, deadlines overlap and there is absolutely no institutional support provided to struggling students.
label: complaint

text: Several students including myself have been experiencing serious anxiety and burnout this semester but the administration has done nothing to address it despite multiple written requests.
label: complaint

text: The promised counselling center that was announced last semester has still not been set up. Students who need mental health support have nowhere to go on campus.
label: complaint

text: Exam schedules are being changed at the last minute causing extreme stress among students. The administration is completely indifferent to the mental health impact of such poor planning.
label: complaint

text: My exam result was marked incorrectly and despite raising it with the teacher two weeks ago, no correction has been made to my record.
label: complaint

text: My child has been bullied in class for the past month and despite informing the class teacher twice, the situation has not been addressed.
label: complaint

text: The projector in my classroom has been broken for three weeks and repeated requests to the maintenance team have gone unanswered.
label: complaint

text: The fee payment was processed on our end ten days ago, yet the school portal still shows an outstanding balance and my son was sent home over it.
label: complaint

text: I have not received the teaching materials promised at the start of term and it has forced me to create everything from scratch on top of my existing workload.
label: complaint

text: The timetable was changed without any prior notice and I missed an important test because I was in the wrong room at the wrong time.
label: complaint

text: A student in my class disclosed a serious personal issue to me last week and I still have not received any guidance or support from the counselling department.
label: complaint

text: Cheating in exams is very openly happening in our college. Students who cannot solve basic problems are somehow passing easily.
label: complaint

text: The hostel mess serves the same dal bhat and aloo every single day. We pay Rs 7000 but the quality is absolutely terrible.
label: complaint

text: Our teacher has been absent for 8 out of 12 classes. No substitute has been arranged. More than half the syllabus is still uncovered.
label: complaint

text: The network lecturer has great subject knowledge but the classroom is too small for 60 students. Hard to hear from the back rows.
label: feedback

text: The economics lecturer relies too much on slides and never gives real world examples. Classes feel quite boring and dry.
label: feedback

text: The science fair had good experiments but honestly most students were just standing around with no real interest shown.
label: feedback

text: The internship placement cell did a good job bringing in diverse companies this year. However the soft skills training before the fair was very weak.
label: feedback

text: The IEEE orientation was very informative. Got a clear picture of what the club does and what opportunities are available. Would recommend all juniors attend.
label: feedback

text: The new biometric attendance system is good for reducing bunking but the fingerprint scanner fails multiple times every single day.
label: feedback

text: The coding bootcamp mentors were incredibly patient and the curriculum was very hands on. The fee was a bit on the higher side though.
label: feedback

text: The blood donation camp was very well organized. Really proud of the student union for putting this together.
label: feedback

text: Prof. Miller taught me to do elegant proofs in 18.014 Calculus with Theory. He is a great professor you learn so much but have to put efforts . He do proofs very natural and is a brilliant Mathematician . Sofía
label: feedback

text: In 2006 I took Math 18.014 Calculus with Theory with Professor Haynes R Miller . Is an excellent Professor he explained extremely well but the class is extremely beautiful and difficult. We used Tom Apostol Book that has two Volume This Course cover a lot of material From Single Variable Calculus, Multivariable Calculus, Linear Algebra and ODES
label: feedback

text: Mr Ram,our economics professor  is a very knowledgeable person with clear and concise presentation, sense of humor without being cheesy and was a fair grader.
label: feedback

text: Mr.Saurav Das our operating system teacher was very rude to the students  in classroom and would complain all the time about the college administration especially concerning his salary and was always late to arrive in classroom.
label: feedback

text: Mr.Noah Xhosa was a very funny teacher and would always give short stories from his life but the content he taught was very boring to go through.He tried his very best to make the content as engaging as possible.
label: feedback

text: UIC offers strong student support, including healthcare, legal aid, and mental health services. On an individual level, UIC is amazing because of the people who genuinely support students. However, institutionally there are still disparities on campus and a noticeable disconnect in support for Black students that should be addressed and improved.
label: feedback

text: The "Basics Of Engineering" program conducted by the IT club was very helpful of us juniors who were just getting the hang of the engineering life and I got to learn about the stories of Aluminis and also got to meet new friends along with valuble insights on the upcoming four years.
label: feedback

text: The grading criteria for the essay was changed after we submitted our work, and my score dropped significantly as a result.
label: complaint

text: My son's internal assessment marks were never uploaded to the portal and he is now at risk of failing the term despite completing all his work.
label: complaint

text: My daughter came home with an injury she said happened during PE, but no incident report was filed and the school has not contacted us to explain what occurred.
label: complaint

text: I have submitted my leave application three times through the official channel and it has still not been approved or acknowledged, leaving my class without a cover plan.
label: complaint

text: The lab equipment assigned to our group was faulty during the practical exam and the invigilator refused to allow us extra time to compensate.
label: complaint

text: A junior colleague was promoted to department head despite having less experience and no prior leadership role, and the selection process was never made transparent to existing staff.
label: complaint

text: The Wi-Fi in the computer lab drops out constantly during online assessments and we have raised this issue multiple times with no resolution.
